notes: Added AI Plan button and AiPlanModal to CalendarPage. Two-step pipeline: generate-plan then generate-captions batch. Per-post confirm/dismiss/regenerate in review step. Schedules confirmed posts via postsService.create. Updated PlatformChip with all 7 platforms (facebook, linkedin, youtube, twitter added). Added generateCaptions to ai.service.ts. Added PlanPost, CaptionItem, GenerateCaptionsRequest, CaptionsResponse, Tone, Platform types to api.types.ts.
